name: Operation Phantom Receipt
description:
Scenario

Our intrusion detection systems have just lit up! A user, jdoe, inadvertently downloaded a seemingly innocuous file named Payment_Receipt.exe from an untrusted external IP. Shortly after, the SOC dashboard exploded with critical alerts.

Your task as a SOC Analyst is to investigate this incident by analyzing the provided alert logs. The adversary didn't just stop at initial access. We suspect the infamous PhantomStealer malware has been deployed, aiming to plunder sensitive credentials before exfiltrating the loot to a remote Command and Control (C2) server.

Objectives

  • Initial Access: Identify the malicious file, its hash, and the initial download source.
  • Execution & Evasion: Analyze the execution chain and uncover the obfuscated commands used to evade defenses.
  • Credential Access: Determine which browsers and applications were targeted by the stealer.
  • Exfiltration: Pinpoint the adversary's C2 infrastructure (IP and port) and the data exfiltration channels.
  • Analysis: Filter out the noise by distinguishing between true positive indicators of compromise and false positive background activities.

Dive into the logs, reconstruct the kill chain, and uncover the full scope of the breach. Good luck, analyst!
